title: phyllanthus pilifer
intro: Phyllanthus pilifer, also known as the hairy seed box or hairy box berry, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus pilifer include its potential to treat liver diseases, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine in various parts of the world.
